message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title band301

participant "BTManager" as BTM
participant "BTCallback" as BTCB
participant "BleController" as BC
participant "ScannerPresenter" as SP
participant "LeScannerV21" as LS
participant "WristbandManager" as WM
participant "L2Layer" as L2L
participant "L2KeyPacket" as L2KP
participant "L2CMDPacket" as L2CP
participant "L1Layer" as L1L
participant "L1Packet" as L1P
participant "GattLayer" as GL
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BG

== Initialization ==
BTM->BTCB: onCreate
activate BTCB
BTCB->WM: instial
activate WM
WM->L2L: new
activate L2L
L2L->L1L: new
activate L1L
L1L->L1P: new
activate L1P
L1P->GL: new
activate GL
GL->BG: new
activate BG
deactivate BG
deactivate GL
deactivate L1P
deactivate L1L
deactivate L2L
deactivate WM
BTCB->BC: instial
activate BC
BC->SP: new
activate SP
SP->LS: new
activate LS
deactivate LS
deactivate SP
deactivate BC
deactivate BTCB

== 搜索设备 ==
BC->BC: forceScan
BC->BC: scan4Device
activate BC
note left of BC: 搜索蓝牙设备
BC->SP: scanDevice
activate SP
SP->SP: scan4e
SP->SP: scan4Device
SP->SP: startScan
SP->SP: onScanResult
SP->SP: notify4eScan
SP->SP: on4eScan
deactivate SP
BC->BC: onNewDevice
BC->BC: mHandler.handleMessage
note left of BC: MSG_FIND_BONDED_DEVICE
deactivate BC

== 建立GATT连接 ==
BC->L2L: Connect：找到合适的地址后，使用该地址进行蓝牙连接
activate L2L
L2L->L1L: connect
activate L1L
L1L->L1L: startTxSchedule
L1L->L1L: startRxSchedule
note right of L1L: 开启两个线程，Tx发送，Rx接收
L1L->BG: connect
activate BG
BG->BG: onConnectionStateChange
BG->BG: requestMtu
note left of BG: 设置MTU：240
BG->BG: onMtuChanged
BG->BG: discoverServices
BG->BG: onServicesDiscovered
note left of BG: 通过UUID，发现我们设置的Services和数据特征Characteristic
BG->BG: onDescriptorWrite
BG->L1L: mGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L1L->L2L: mTransportCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L2L->WM: mApplicationCallback.onConnectionStateChange
note left of WM: MSG_STATE_CONNECTED
WM->BC: mHandler.handleMessage
BC->BC: StartLoginProcess
BC->SP: RequestLogin
SP->SP: RequestSetNeedInfo
SP->SP: SetUserProfile
deactivate SP
deactivate BC
deactivate L2L
deactivate L1L
deactivate BG

== 封装并发送数据-Tx ==
WM->L2L: SettingCmdUserSetting
activate L2L
L2L->L2KP: preparePacket：key(1B):data.len(2B):data
L2L->L2CP: preparePacket：cmd(1B):version(1B)
note left of L2L: 封装L2
L2L->L1L: sendData
activate L1L
L1L->L1P: prepareDataPacket
activate L1P
note left of L1P: 封装L1
L1P->L1P: preparePacket
L1P->L1P: magic:AB, er-ack-version:00, len2(B):crc(2B):seq(2B)
L1P->L1P: addToTxPacketList
L1P->L1P: ThreadTx.run
note left of L1P: 每隔1秒查询一次是否有新数据，有就发送，重试3次
L1P->L1P: getFromTxPacketList
L1P->L1P: UnpackSendPacket
L1P->BG: sendGattLayerData
L1P->L1P: sendData
L1P->L1P: tellUpStackPacketSend
note left of L1P: 反馈发送成功，SequenceId++
L1P->L1L: onDataSend
deactivate L1P
deactivate L1L
deactivate L2L

== 接收数据-Rx ==
BG->BG: onCharacteristicChanged
activate BG
BG->BG: mGattCallback.onDataReceive
BG->BG: receiveData
BG->L1L: decodeReceiveData
activate L1L
note left of L1L: 拆包L1
L1L->L1L: parseHeader:解析出magic，ack，总长度，crc，seqnumid
L1L->L1L: parseData
note left of L1L: 如果接收的数据长度等于L1中记录的总长度则返回 LT_FULL_PACKET\n否则，把数据暂存起来（存504B），返回LT_SUCCESS，等待剩余数据传输过来
L1L->L1L: sendAckPacket
L1L->L1L: addToRxPacketList
L1L->L1L: ThreadRx.run
note left of L1L: 向对手发送成功的ack
note left of L1L: 每隔1秒查询一次是否有新数据，有就拆包
L1L->L1L: getFromRxPacketList
L1L->L2L: onDataReceive
activate L2L
note left of L2L: 拆包L2
L2L->L2L: parsedata:拆包L2: cmd(1B):version(1B)
L2L->L2L: parsedata:拆包 key(1B)，len(2B):data
L2L->WM: onHandshakeCallback
deactivate L2L
deactivate L1L
deactivate BG

== handshake ==
BC->WM: handshake
activate WM
WM->L2L: handshake
activate L2L
L2L->L1L: handshake
activate L1L
L1L->L1L: sendData
L1L->L2L: onDataReceive
L2L->WM: onHandshakeCallback
WM->BC: onHandshakeCallback
deactivate BC
deactivate WM
deactivate L2L
deactivate L1L

@enduml
```
